Dialogue.Line: This is a placeholder dialogue line. It is intentionally long so it wraps across multiple lines inside the dialogue box and demonstrates word wrapping.
This is a second placeholder line spoken by a different speaker.

Choice.prompt: This is a placeholder choice prompt.

Option.text: This is the first placeholder option.
This is the second placeholder option.

Dialogue.Line: This is the placeholder branch line for the first option.
This is the placeholder branch line for the second option.
